description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push and pull requests to the main and vnext branches. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: test, docs, benchmarks, examples, notebooks, and array_api_tests. The test job runs on a matrix of OS, Python versions, and configurations, installing dependencies, running tests with pytest, and uploading coverage reports to Codecov. Other jobs build and test documentation, run benchmarks, execute examples and notebooks, and test array API implementations.
